sections.title: 1. N+1 Query Pattern ŌĆö HIGH severity
sections.content:
**`apps/api/src/modules/todo/todo.service.ts:131-138`**

The `reorder()` method calls `findById` + `save` in a loop ŌĆö 20+ DB calls to reorder 10 todos. Fix: add a `updateOrderBatch` repository method and replace the loop with a single call.

---

sections.title: 2. Unnecessary Re-renders ŌĆö MEDIUM severity
sections.content:
**`apps/pwa/src/components/todos/completed-section.tsx:21-23`** ŌĆö `[...todos].sort(...)` runs on every render. Wrap in `useMemo([todos])`.

**`apps/pwa/src/components/todos/completed-content.tsx:23-37`** ŌĆö `.filter()` + `.sort()` + `new Date()` per item on every render. Both the filtered list and the date-keyed grouping map should be memoized.

---

sections.title: 3. Missing TanStack Query Caching ŌĆö MEDIUM severity (widespread)
sections.content:
Every `useQuery` in these files is missing `staleTime`/`gcTime`, causing refetches on every navigation:

| File | Hooks affected |
|---|---|
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/todos.ts` | `useTodoLists`, `useTodos`, `useAllTodos` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/habits.ts` | `useHabits`, `useHabit`, `useHabitEntries` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/light.ts` | `useUserLight`, `useLightEvents` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/calendar.ts` | `useCalendarData`, `useCalendarRange` |

**Fix pattern** (calendar data is safe at 30min, user-mutated data at 5min):
```typescript
staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,   // mark fresh for 5 min
gcTime:   10 * 60 * 1000,   // keep in cache 10 min
```

---

sections.title: 4. Inline Regex Compilation ŌĆö LOW severity
sections.content:
Same `/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/` regex is compiled on every request in:
- `apps/api/src/modules/light/light.service.ts:51`
- `apps/api/src/modules/journal/journal.service.ts:118`
- `apps/api/src/modules/calendar/calendar.controller.ts`

Fix: hoist to module-level `const ISO_DATE_RE = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/`.

---

sections.title: 5. Memory Leaks ŌĆö None Found
sections.content:
Event listener cleanups in `paywall-listener.tsx`, `update-checker.tsx`, and `journal-celebration.tsx` all have proper `return () => cleanup()` patterns.

---

**Top 2 highest-impact changes to make first:**
1. The N+1 batch fix in `todo.service.ts` ŌĆö eliminates O(n) DB round-trips per reorder.
2. Adding `staleTime` to the TanStack Query hooks ŌĆö eliminates redundant API calls on every route transition for all four data domains.

codeBlocks.code:
staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,   // mark fresh for 5 min
gcTime:   10 * 60 * 1000,   // keep in cache 10 min

rawOutputPreview:
Here's a summary of the performance findings across the codebase:

---

## Performance Analysis Results

### 1. N+1 Query Pattern ŌĆö HIGH severity
**`apps/api/src/modules/todo/todo.service.ts:131-138`**

The `reorder()` method calls `findById` + `save` in a loop ŌĆö 20+ DB calls to reorder 10 todos. Fix: add a `updateOrderBatch` repository method and replace the loop with a single call.

---

### 2. Unnecessary Re-renders ŌĆö MEDIUM severity

**`apps/pwa/src/components/todos/completed-section.tsx:21-23`** ŌĆö `[...todos].sort(...)` runs on every render. Wrap in `useMemo([todos])`.

**`apps/pwa/src/components/todos/completed-content.tsx:23-37`** ŌĆö `.filter()` + `.sort()` + `new Date()` per item on every render. Both the filtered list and the date-keyed grouping map should be memoized.

---

### 3. Missing TanStack Query Caching ŌĆö MEDIUM severity (widespread)

Every `useQuery` in these files is missing `staleTime`/`gcTime`, causing refetches on every navigation:

| File | Hooks affected |
|---|---|
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/todos.ts` | `useTodoLists`, `useTodos`, `useAllTodos` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/habits.ts` | `useHabits`, `useHabit`, `useHabitEntries` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/light.ts` | `useUserLight`, `useLightEvents` |
| `apps/pwa/src/lib/api/calendar.ts` | `useCalendarData`, `useCalendarRange` |

**Fix pattern** (calendar data is safe at 30min, user-mutated data at 5min):
```typescript
staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000,   // mark fresh for 5 min
gcTime:   10 * 60 * 1000,   // keep in cache 10 min
```

---

### 4. Inline Regex Compilation ŌĆö LOW severity

Same `/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/` regex is compiled on every request in:
- `apps/api/src/modules/light/light.service.ts:51`
- `apps/api/src/modules/journal/journal.service.ts:118`
- `apps/api/src/modules/calendar/calendar.controller.ts`

Fix: hoist to module-level `const ISO_DATE_RE = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/`.

---

### 5. Memory Leaks ŌĆö None Found
